description: Convert the 10 mixed-format academic citations in /home/ga/Documents/raw_citations.docx to proper APA 7th edition format. Ensure all entries use correct author formatting, parenthetical years, sentence-case article titles, and italicized publication titles. The final list must include a centered 'References' heading, be sorted alphabetically by the first author's last name, and utilize a 0.5-inch hanging indent. Save the updated document to the original path.
